titleStmt.title: SII 9.685: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 685. (A.R. No. 318 of 1925.) ON A STONE LYING BEFORE THE KARNAM'S HOUSE AT KOTTUR KUDLIGI TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1502, Vikrama, Mārgaśira, ba. 10, corresponding to A.D. 1580 December 1, Thursday (not verifiable), in the reign of Timmarājaya-Mahā-arasu, son of Rāmarājayyadēva-Mahā-arasu ruling from Ānegondi. It records that Vādi-Nāyaka, son of Māchi-Nāyaka of Bāguḷi, agent to the king, exempted the shepherds of Koṭṭūrasīme from tax on their sheep. The gift was made in the presence of the god Kallinātha of Bāguḷi, for the merit of his parents. Koṭṭūra-sīme is stated to have been situated in Kōgaḷi-vēṇṭhe, a sub-division of Pāṇḍya-nāḍu in Hastināvati-vaḷita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē . tra
yilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē .
śubhamastu śrījayābhyudayaśālivāhanaśakavaruśaṁ
gaḷu 1502 neya vikramasaṁvatsarada mārgaśira ba 10 llu śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa rāmarājayyadēvamahāarasugaḷa komāra tiṁmarājayamahāarasugaḷu Āneyagoṁ
diya paṭaṇadalu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi pruthvīrājyaṁgeyyuttiruva kāladalli Ā tiṁmarāja
yyadēvamahāarsarige kāryyakarttarāda śrīma(ṁ)nmahānāyakācāryyabhāṣetappuvanāyakara gaṁḍa maṟehokkare kāva
māṟāṁtaraṁ koluva bāguḷiya śrīmācināyakara makaḷu vādināyakanavaru koṭṭūra sīmeya kuṟuba
kula śiddappavoḍeyara makaḷu siddappavoḍeyarigū Aḷiya rēvaṁṇavoḍeyarigū
ĀcyutappavoḍeyarigeŪ veya liṁgaṁṇavoḍeyarigū bāguḷiya gōpaṇagauḍana
maga cikkaṇagauḍa guravagauṁḍa yivaru muṁtāda koṭūra sīmeya samastakuṟuba pra
jegaḷige koṭṭa dharmaśāsanada paṭṭeya kramaveṁteṁdare nāu Ādavani hastināvativaḷitada pāṁ
ḍyanāḍa kōgaḷiya vēṁṭheyake saluva koṭūra sīmeyoḷagaṇa grāmagaḷoḷage yihaṁthā kuṟu
ba vokkalugaḷu Aramanege teṟuvaṁthā kuṟideṟigeyanu
pakṣada samaya prasaṁgagaḷu baṁdu mahāparvada pu(ṁ)
ṇyakāladallu . śrībāgaḷiya kallināthadēvara saṁnidhiyalli naṁmagurusvāmigū naṁma mātāpi
tṛgaḷigū pu(ṁ)ṇya Adhikavāgabēku Eṁdu ni(ṁ)mma samasta prajegaḷige ni(ṁ)mma putrapautrapā
raṁpareyāgi sarvamānyavāgi naḍevahāge Ā kuṟideṟigeyanū biṭu
dharmadhāreyaneṟadu koṭṭeU yī kuṟideṟigeyanu mā(ṁ)nyavamāḍi biṭṭaṁ
thā dharmavanu �yo bhūmiyu �yo sūryyacaṁdrādigaḷu Uḷḷalli pariyaṁtradallū tappade naḍa
saluḷavaru �yo dharmake Āru tappidarū Avaru taṁma gurudaivake drōhavaneṇisidavaru
taṁma mātāpitrugaḷanu vāraṇāsiyali koṁda pātakake hōharu �yo dharmavanu Āru tappade pra
tipālisikoṁḍu baṁdare Avarige Ihaparadalli sukhasadgatigaḷuṁṭu yeṁdu nāu naṁma svanu
ruciyiṁdalū trivācā vaḍaṁbaṭṭu koṭṭa kuṟideṟigeya sarvamā(ṁ)nyavā
gi biṭa dharmaśāsanada kalu . ślōkā . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānāchrēyōnupālanaṁ .
dānāsvargamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ .
śrī bīraliṁga .
Digital edition of SII 9.685 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
